WakeUpPoseidon4ED_3.english: Your Majesty, your hand has stopped.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_5.english: No, there's no need to apologize.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_7.korean: 새로 오픈한 카페 포세이돈이 신경 쓰이십니까?
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_7.english: Are you curious about the newly opened Café Poseidon?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_9.korean: 아무리 생각해도 내가 왜 출입 제한인지 모르겠어.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_9.english: No matter how I think about it, I can't figure out why I'm barred from entering.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_10.english: Do you happen to know, Armand?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_13.english: If that’s the case, you have nothing to worry about.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_14.english: There isn’t a single bioroid in Orca who dislikes Your Majesty.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_15.english: I can say that with certainty.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_16.korean: 그렇다면 다행이지만… 그럼 다른 이유가 있을 텐데… 도통 모르겠단 말이지…
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_16.english: That’s a relief, but… there must be another reason… I just have no clue…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_17.korean: 그렇게 고민하지 않으셔도, 곧 아시게 될 겁니다.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_17.english: You don’t need to fret; you’ll find out soon enough.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_22.korean: 카페 얘기는 들었어. 잘 돼 가고 있어?
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_22.english: I heard about the café. Is it going well?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_24.korean: 이게 다… 초 천재… 미소녀… 우읍… 멀린님… 덕분… 이지…
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_24.english: It’s all… thanks to the super‑genius… beautiful girl… *cough*… Merlin… thanks… it’s…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_25.korean: 어… 근데 상태가 안 좋아 보이는데, 괜찮아?
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_25.english: Uh… you don’t look great. Are you okay?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_26.english: I’m fine… lately… *cough*… I’ve been pushing myself a bit too hard…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_27.english: The café’s fine, but please don’t overdo it.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_29.english: And… the one who showed up… was none other than…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_30.korean: 오늘… 아서를 카페 포세이돈에... 초대하려고 해…
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_30.english: Today… I’m going to invite Arthur to Café Poseidon…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_33.korean: 후후후… 사실 지금까지 아서의 출입을 막은 건 감마 대장님의 의견이었어.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_33.english: Hehehe… actually, it was Captain Gamma’s idea that kept Arthur out until now.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_35.english: He said it wasn’t ready yet…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_36.korean: 아서만큼은 제대로 준비해서 맞이하고 싶다고 했거든…
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_36.english: He wanted to make sure Arthur got a proper welcome…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_37.korean: 그리고 드디어… 그 준비가 됐단 말씀…! 우욱…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_38.english: Of course… you’ll come, right, Arthur?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_40.korean: - 잠시 후, 서둘러 업무를 끝낸 나는 카페 포세이돈으로 향했다.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_40.english: – After finishing my work in a hurry, I headed for Café Poseidon.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_41.korean: - 출입문 앞에는 어제까지만 해도 놓여 있던 팻말이 사라져 있었다.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_41.english: – The sign that had been out front until yesterday was gone.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_42.korean: 카페 포세이돈에… 어서 와라. 주, 주인님…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_44.english: Then I’ll show you to your seat.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_47.korean: 미안하지만, 오늘은 메뉴가 정해져 있다. 개인적인 주문은 받지 않는다.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_47.english: I’m sorry, but today the menu is fixed. We can’t take personal requests.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_48.english: Really? Then I’ll leave it to you.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_49.korean: 금방 가져올 테니 조금만 기다려라. 주, 주인님…
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_49.english: I’ll bring it right away, just wait a moment. M-Master…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_51.korean: - ‘주인님’이라는 말은 지금까지 수도 없이 들었지만, 이건 또 새로운 느낌이네.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_51.english: I've heard the word “master” countless times, but this feels different.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_53.korean: - 생각했던 것보다 너무 잘 어울려… 귀엽잖아…?
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_53.english: It suits you even better than I imagined… so cute…?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_55.korean:
큭… 여, 여기… 카페 포세이돈 점장, 레모네이드 감마가…​
주인님만을 위해 만든 특별 메뉴다.​
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_55.english: Hmph… h‑here… Lemonade Gamma, manager of Café Poseidon… This is a special menu I made just for you, Master.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_56.english: A special menu made for me?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_58.korean:
어디가 특별한 건지 궁금하다고…?
그, 그건… 빙수 위에 뿌려진 시럽이… 이 감마님의 수제라는 사실이다.​
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_58.english: You’re curious what makes it special…? Well, the syrup drizzled over the shaved ice… it’s homemade by me, Gamma.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_60.korean:
에잇! 지금 그런 건 아무래도 좋다!​
중요한 건, 카페 포세이돈의 점장인 내가 주인님을 위해 특별히 이 메뉴를 준비했다는 거다!​
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_60.english: Ugh! That doesn’t matter right now! What’s important is that I, the manager of Café Poseidon, prepared this menu especially for you, Master!

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_61.korean:
젠장… 멀린 녀석… 정말 이런 게 먹힌다고…?​
만약 소용없으면 각오하는 게 좋을 거야…​
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_61.english: Damn… Merlin… you really think this will work…? If it doesn’t, you’d better be ready…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_63.korean:
앗, 아직 먹지 마라!​
해야 할 게 남아 있다… 이게 들어가야 진정한 특별 메뉴라는군…​
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_63.english: Ah, don’t eat it yet! There’s still something left to do… it has to be added for it to be a true special menu…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_64.korean:
…큭, 잘 들어라…! 두 번은 안 한다!​
이건 주인님 전용 1회 한정이니까! 웃으면… 진짜로 뒤진다!​
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_64.english: …Hmph, listen up…! I won’t do this twice! This is a one‑time‑only, Master‑only offering! If you laugh… you’ll really die!

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_66.korean:
크흠… 지금도 맛있지만, 더 맛있어지는 주문을 해드릴게요~​
맛있어져라~ 모에 모에~~~ 뀽♥​
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_66.english: Ahem… It’s already tasty, but I’ll cast a spell to make it even more delicious~ Become delicious~ Moe moe~~~ *kiss*

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_68.korean:
……언, 언제까지 내 얼굴을 보고 있을 거냐!​
이제 됐으니까 아무 말 말고 빙수를 먹어라, 빙수를!​
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_68.english: …Hey, how long are you going to keep staring at my face! It’s enough—just eat the shaved ice, already!

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_69.korean:
주문 고마워.
먹지도 않았는데 벌써부터 맛있는 느낌이 들어.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_69.english: Thanks for the order. I haven’t even taken a bite, but it already feels delicious.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_71.korean:
…어때?​
너무 차갑진 않나…? 달기만 한 건 또 싫어하나 싶어서, 꽤 고민했는데.​
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_71.english: …How is it? Not too cold…? I was worried you might hate something that’s just sweet, so I put a lot of thought into it.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_73.korean:
뭐야, 그 얼굴은.​
그렇게 멍하니 웃고 있으면… 진짜로 주문이 통했다는 느낌이 들잖아.​
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_73.english: What’s with that face? If you keep smiling blankly like that… it really feels like the spell worked.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_74.english: Of course it did—the spell really worked.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_75.korean: 이렇게 맛있는 빙수를 먹어 보는 건 처음이야.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_75.english: This is the first time I’ve ever had such delicious shaved ice.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_76.korean:
그, 그런가… 그럼 다행이고…​
명색이 카페 포세이돈 점장이 전력으로 만든 메뉴인데, 주인님 입에서 ‘맛있다’라는 말 정도는 들어야지.​
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_76.english: I‑I see… then that’s a relief… After all, I’m the manager of Café Poseidon and I poured my all into this menu; I should at least hear you say it’s tasty.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_77.korean: 이렇게 맛있으니까 카페 포세이돈 신메뉴로 추가되는 거야?
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_77.english: So because it’s this good, it’ll become a new menu item at Café Poseidon?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_78.korean: 그건 좀 아쉬울지도… 나만을 위한 특별 메뉴가 아니게 되잖아.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_78.english: That’d be a shame… it wouldn’t be a special menu just for me anymore.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_79.korean:
그건 걱정하지 않아도 된다. 메뉴판엔 올리지 않을 작정이다.​
이건 주인님만을 위한 특별 메뉴니까.​
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_79.english: No need to worry about that. I won’t put it on the menu. This is a special dish made only for you, Master.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_80.korean:
만약 또 먹고 싶다면… 방금처럼 내 얼굴을 빤히 보고 있어라.​
날 계속 바라봐 준다면, 이런 빙수 만드는 건 일도 아니지.​
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_80.english: If you want more… just stare at my face like you did just now. Keep looking at me, and making this shaved ice will be a breeze.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_81.korean:
그러니까 지금은… 아무 말 말고, 한 숟갈 더 떠 먹어라.​
그게 카페 포세이돈 점장을 위한 최고의 답례다.​
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_81.english: So for now… don’t say a word, just take another spoonful. That’s the best thanks a manager can give.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_82.korean:
…그리고 말인데, 내가 이렇게까지 해줬으면… 점장 쪽에서도 답례 정도는 바랄 수 있지 않겠나?​
카페 포세이돈 영업이 끝난 뒤에… 조금 더 남아 있을 수 있겠어?​
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_82.english: …And speaking of that, since I’ve gone this far… shouldn’t the manager at least expect a little something in return? After Café Poseidon closes… could you stay a bit longer?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_83.korean: 응, 내가 할 수 있는 거라면 뭐든지 답례할게.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_83.english: Yeah, I’ll repay you with anything I can.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_84.korean:
손님이 전부 돌아가고 가게 문을 닫으면… 그땐 카페가 아니라, 주인님과 나만 활개 할 수 있는 전장이 되니까.​
그 시간에 무슨 주문을 넣을 지는… 주인님 마음대로 해라. 이 몸이 전부 받아주마.​
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_84.english: When all the customers have left and the shop closes… it won’t be a café any more, but a battlefield where only you and I can run wild. As for what orders you place then… do as you wish, Master. I’ll accept them all.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_85.korean: - 그날 저녁, 영업을 종료한 카페 포세이돈에서는
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_85.english: —That evening, after Café Poseidon had closed for the day,

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_86.korean: - 다른 손님들에게는 내놓을 수 없는, 오직 한 사람만을 위한 특별한 주문이…
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_86.english: —a special order that could never be offered to any other customer, made for just one person…
